title: Questions about lance of longinus
wikitext:
[]: Questions about lance of longinus             Quote Post by Apollonysus » Sat Sep 21, 2013 8:07 pm In the wiki page of Spear of Longinus, it writes The one seen in the show is also not the only Spear of Longinus created: Every Seed of Life, including both Adam and Lilith, was sent with a counterpart Spear, meaning seven in all.

[]:             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Sat Sep 21, 2013 9:15 pm That's because a lot of information just isnt in the show, and if it is then it is entirely speculative.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Sat Sep 21, 2013 9:49 pm Information that there's 1 spear per Seed of Life and 7 Seeds comes from the Japanese-only supplemental-material games NGE2 and its PSP port NGE2: Another Cases. The "7 Seeds" stuff comes from one of Kaworu's endings in that game, and the other spear stuff comes from the Classified Information files. Notable detractors of the inclusion of the game in discussions include Chuckman and NemZ, who subscribe to the literary theory that one should interpret a literary text independently of all outside sources, be it interviews with the author(s) or supplemental material.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Sep 21, 2013 10:13 pm See, I've never known, nor have I ever cared where the Lance of Longinus came from. I guess I always just assumed that it belonged to Adam simply because they retrieved it from the epicenter of 2nd Impact in NGE, and the thing is certainly big enough for the Giant of Light to have used at one point. So, Adam owning the Spear is totally canon to the show in that regard. Everything else is neither here nor there to the plot for NGE, so it's inclusion or exclusion is irrelevant to the understanding or enjoyment of the show. I just see it as a whole mess of "meh," and would probably only enjoy thinking of such things if I were actually playing the video games or any other work that would include that information into the plot in some way, even if it is just through dialogue-heavy, text-presented exposition.

[]:             Quote Post by Apollonysus » Sat Sep 21, 2013 11:28 pm Since I have not played these supplemental games yet , I am curious about relevant plots in the games from which we could infer such analysis. I wonder if there were someone who has posted the detailed information in the game. I believe it could be of great help for us to understand the settings of the show better and deeper.

[]:             Quote Post by Falcon_of_the_Sun » Sun Sep 22, 2013 8:08 am Apollonysus wrote: Since I have not played these supplemental games yet , I am curious about relevant plots in the games from which we could infer such analysis. I wonder if there were someone who has posted the detailed information in the game. I believe it could be of great help for us to understand the settings of the show better and deeper.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Mon Sep 23, 2013 9:26 am Apollonysus wrote: Since I have not played these supplemental games yet , I am curious about relevant plots in the games from which we could infer such analysis. I wonder if there were someone who has posted the detailed information in the game. I believe it could be of great help for us to understand the settings of the show better and deeper.

[]:             Quote Post by Apollonysus » Tue Sep 24, 2013 3:19 am Falcon_of_the_Sun wrote: For what my 2cents are worth, I liked the idea of an "Anno-type of authority" (for lack of a better term) to try and make things clearer. This said, I don't think that some of the holes and gaps in Eva detract anything from the quality of the series anyway. Some details did not make much sense or were open to multiple interpretations before the Classified Information were avaialble, and as much as I like the discussion of those things, it was ok for me to have those flaws, if you want. Stylistically, though, I find the presence of the First Ancenstral Race like some sort of clarified deus ex-machina a bit forceful. But there again, you can't have your cake and eat it: if you like mysteries, you can't like their complete clarification, can you?

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Sep 24, 2013 5:54 am Apollonysus wrote: Of couse I did. In fact, I read all of them on the first day I registered. Unfortunately, I still find it hard to get directely useful hints to my questions from those threads even after I reviewed them. I could not find information about nartue or properties of the Spear. Please forgive my carelessness and dull mind. Would you do me a favour to tell me the details that I missed?

[]:             Quote Post by Apollonysus » Tue Sep 24, 2013 9:40 pm Bagheera wrote: What are you talking about? You asked about the plots of the games, and they're right there in those threads. As for the Spear: that's in the CI (which comes from those games), as previously noted. It's a security device, it's semi-sentient, it was created by the FAR to keep the Seeds in check. I'm not sure what else you're looking for here.
